basic_details.job_title: Child Development Department Hathras – Anganwadi Worker – 229 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bal Vikas Pariyojana (Child Development Project), Hathras (8 Projects)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at http://upanganwadibharti.in (no offline / postal applications accepted)
basic_details.short_information: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Get latest UP Anganwadi recruitment notification 2026 for 229 Anganwadi Worker vacancies in Hathras District. Apply online from 18 May 2026 to 4 June 2026 through the official UP Anganwadi career portal.

age_limit.age_details: Age relaxation as per UP Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Widow/Divorced candidates - check official advertisement for specific relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent. Maximum qualification considered: Post Graduation (Parasnaatak). Merit is prepared based on combined marks from Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (all examinations). Candidates must fill marks for all examinations (Intermediate, Graduation, Post Graduation) at the time of application.

selection_process: Merit-based on combined marks of Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (combined total). Tie-break: higher age, then higher educational qualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the UP Anganwadi Bharti portal (http://upanganwadibharti.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Applications must be submitted within 21 days of the official advertisement publication date. The application form must be filled correctly and completely in the format available on the departmental website. Self-attested, clean, and legible copies of all documents mentioned in the application must be uploaded. Any error, incorrect data, or forged/fabricated documents will result in cancellation of candidature.
seo_tags: UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 229 Posts in Hathras District
